summary: Final launch-readiness polish regression — 100% pass. Backend: 17/17 pytest cases still pass (all 8 API endpoints healthy: /api/, /api/newsletter/subscribe, /api/contact, /api/tools/budget-calculator, /api/tools/itinerary-generator, /api/tools/area-finder, /api/tools/packing-checklist, /api/tools/best-time). Sitemap regeneration verified: GET /sitemap.xml → 200 with exactly 44 <url> entries (26 static + 18 blog articles), 18 <lastmod>2025-11-10</lastmod> entries on the article URLs, /florence /rome /venice destination URLs present, ALL <loc> values start with https://affittacameregliarchi.com. GET /robots.txt → 200; ignoring the Cloudflare-managed content-signal preamble, our directives are intact after the '# END Cloudflare Managed Content' marker: 'User-agent: *', 'Allow: /', 'Disallow: /api/', 'Sitemap: https://affittacameregliarchi.com/sitemap.xml'. SEO metadata now single-source-of-truth via react-helmet-async — spot-checked /, /italy, /florence, /rome, /venice, /travel-tools/budget-calculator, /blog/best-things-to-do-in-siena, /nonexistent-route: every route emits exactly 1 <title>, 1 <meta name=description>, 1 <link rel=canonical>. The duplicate title/desc P1 defect from iteration_2 is FIXED. 404 route correctly emits meta robots=noindex,nofollow. JSON-LD schemas emit correctly: home=[WebSite, Organization]; city pages (/florence /rome /venice) = [BreadcrumbList, TouristDestination, FAQPage]; article page = [BreadcrumbList, Article, FAQPage]. Contact email update verified everywhere: Contact page sidebar shows 'contact@affittacameregliarchi.com', footer email icon links to mailto:contact@affittacameregliarchi.com, /legal/privacy and /legal/editorial both mention new address and no longer reference hello@archi.travel. All 12 requested pages (Home, Italy, Tuscany, Siena, Florence, Rome, Venice, Europe, Asia, Blog, TravelTools, TravelDeals) render with correct H1 and zero console errors. AdPlaceholder 'Advertisement' label present at all expected placements: home=1, article=3, florence=2, travel-deals=1. Contact form E2E: submitted via UI → /api/contact returned 200 → success toast 'Thanks — we\'ll get back to you within 3 business days.' rendered (Resend NOT wired, as expected — write persists to Mongo contact_messages only). Mobile (375x812): nav-mobile-menu-button and nav-mobile-menu-close testids exist and are clickable; no horizontal overflow on /, /tuscany, /siena, /florence, /travel-tools/budget-calculator, /contact.
critical_code_review_comments: Iteration_2 P1 (duplicate <title>/<meta description> from static tags in public/index.html) is confirmed FIXED — every route now has exactly 1 title and 1 description.
sitemap.xml is now generated by /app/frontend/scripts/generate-sitemap.js and wired to `yarn sitemap`. Remember to run it on any content changes (new blog posts / new destination pages).
Cloudflare-managed content-signal preamble on /robots.txt is expected in this preview environment and does not affect our directives.

Carried over from earlier iterations (non-blocking): server.py still uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('shutdown'); newsletter/contact endpoints have no rate limiting. Consider slowapi + FastAPI lifespan for post-launch hardening.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests idempotently create TEST_ prefixed newsletter subscribers and contact_messages. One extra UI-driven contact message (TEST_UI_User_v2) also written via the /contact form.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is launch-ready per this iteration. Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (17 tests, all pass). Sitemap is now dynamically generated — if content is added, main agent should re-run `yarn sitemap` and verify count grows accordingly. No AdSense/Resend wiring by design. All emails have been migrated from hello@archi.travel to contact@affittacameregliarchi.com. If iterating further: focus on rate-limiting the public POST endpoints and modernising the FastAPI lifespan.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found in this iteration.
